name: the drafter binds prose-judge in enforced_by when any clause falls back to semantic enforcement
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-fb --tool semgrep --prose 'Tenants must remain isolated across regions for resilience.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(!d.enforced_by.some(e=>e.tool==="prose-judge.sh"))process.exit(1)' && echo prose-judge-bound 1>&2
